zh.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins於1453年出生。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1475年在英國倫敦享年22歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins于1453年出生。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1475年在英国倫敦享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Adkin (a pet form of Adam formed with the suffix -kin) + genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This name was particularly common in the English Midlands. Compare Atkins .

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Adriano, Aldo, Amadeo, Amedeo, Antonio, Armando, Cristiano, Donato, Emilio, Erasmo, Eugenio, Gerado, Marco, Salvatore, Saverio.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Adamo, an equivalent of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins was born in 1453. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1475, in London, England, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins est né en 1453. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1475, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins wurde 1453 geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 22 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins è nato il nel 1453. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1475, nel London, England, all'età di 22 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkinsは1453年に生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1475年にイギリスロンドンで22歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins(은)는 1453년 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1475년 영국 런던에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins nasceu em 1453. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1475, em London, Inglaterra, com 22 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins родился в 1453 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1475 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 22 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William Edward Adkins nació en 1453. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1475, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 22 años.
